title: Phyllolobium pastorium
taxonomy: Phyllolobium pastorium is classified within the family Ranunculaceae. It belongs to the genus Phyllolobium and is a species of flowering plant. The classification of Phyllolobium pastorium can also be broken down further into the kingdom Plantae and the division Magnoliophyta. This plant is native to the mountainous regions of China. Further detailed classification may include other specific levels such as order, family, genus, and species.
uses: Phyllolobium pastorium is used in traditional medicine for its purported health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
